description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a sharply sloped roof clad in a wood-textured material, contrasting with the predominantly gray and black exterior. The structure is compact, with a geometric, almost modular form, and a prominent overhanging roof section. The facade includes a mix of solid and windowed surfaces, with windows arranged asymmetrically, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The base of the house is elevated and extends outward in a striped pattern, possibly representing a walkway or platform. The entryway appears to be recessed beneath the overhang, offering some shelter and visual interest. Overall, the house combines wood and concrete-like materials for a sleek, urban look.
description: A compact, modern house with a sharply sloped wooden roof, gray and black exterior, and asymmetrical windows, set on a striped platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square entryway beneath the overhanging roof and the striped platform extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steeply sloped wooden roof and the long, striped platform extending to the left.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizing the wooden roof texture and the compact, rectangular footprint of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the roof's slope and the platform extending to the right, with less detail on the entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry beneath overhanging roof, minimalistic with no visible steps or porch
